verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord you're my friend and I love you You are all that i need Saving my soul with your mercy You pour love over me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Ya Mangalisa Ya Mangalisa Ya Mangalisa, Jesu (X2)

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So Amazing Lord So Amazing Lord So Amazing Lord, to me (X2)
